calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

Ms. Alavi stated that with regard to the Tulare matter and the notice of death that they are in agreement, that the petition for special administrator is extraordinary and not routine so it should be allowed, that the filing was done as a benefit to the estate, and that there was a friend of the decedant that was taking paintings, etc. In addition, Ms. Alavi stated that all of the requested fees wouldn't make up for the time spent in this matter. The Court noted that it is limited on the extraordinary fees. Ms. Alavi provided additional argument noting again that this was a benefit to the estate, that the decedent's friend took items, and that they had to file insurance claims to recover some of the loss. At the conclusion of Ms. Alavi's argument, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jun-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
